race.description: Level Electrical Toowoomba Qtis 2yo Maiden Hcp
race.comment: PROFITEUR'S FIL (1) wasn't far away on debut last start over 800m at Ipswich, finishing third and beaten a long neck. Likely improver who should go well. NIFTY'S TREASURE (4) resumes from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Looked close to a win before that break, finishing off with a minor placing over 1200m at Eagle Farm. Looks ready to run following a minor placing in a recent Toowoomba Inner Track trial and is all set for a bold return. PRINCESS NELLIE (8) is a first-starter by Rothesay out of Bam's Princess. Placed in a recent trial. Keep an eye on betting moves. CRIMSON COMMANDER (6) is a two-year-old filly on debut from the stable of Joe Gleeson. By Churchill from Red Roses Too. Looks forward enough after a Toowoomba Inner Track trial win. Respect any market confidence.
